channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Hawthorn's 12-goal comeback falls short as Melbourne secures victory
item.description: Hawthorn delivered one of the most astonishing comebacks in AFL history but fell short against Melbourne in a match that showcased both extremes of performance. The Hawks started the game in disarray,...

item.title: Fitness Creator Gachau Njoroge Shares Earnings from Vurugu 2 Boxing Event
item.description: Fitness content creator Gachau Njoroge has disclosed that he earned KSh 650,000 from participating in the Vurugu 2 boxing event, despite losing the match to his friend Phil. During an interview with A...

item.title: Tragic sinking of B.C. charter boat leaves six missing, four rescued
item.description: A charter boat sank off the coast of British Columbia, leaving six people missing and four rescued. The incident occurred under severe weather conditions, with the vessel carrying passengers and crew....

item.title: Sodium batteries offer sustainable energy storage solutions for renewable energy expansion
item.description: The article discusses the potential of sodium batteries to transform renewable energy storage systems. Unlike lithium-ion batteries, sodium batteries use abundant and low-cost materials, making them a...

item.title: Madonna's 'Confessions II' Receives Praise as Her Best Work in Decades
item.description: Madonna has released her fifteenth album, 'Confessions II', which has been hailed by critics as her best work in decades. The 16-track album blends feel-good club vibes and classic dance music, markin...

item.title: US Troops Withdrawn from Nigeria Following Successful Counterterrorism Operation
item.description: The United States has withdrawn most of its military personnel deployed to Nigeria after completing a joint counterterrorism mission in the Lake Chad Basin. The operation targeted ISIS deputy Abu-Bila...

item.title: A Historical Moment: The Iconic Kissing Photo on V-J Day
item.description: The article discusses the iconic photograph taken on V-J Day (Victory over Japan Day) in 1945, capturing a spontaneous kiss between an American sailor and a woman in Times Square. Originally celebrate...

item.title: Filipinas coach lays out long-term preparation plan for 2027 FIFA Women's World Cup
item.description: The Filipinas national women's football team is beginning to structure its long-term preparations ahead of the 2027 FIFA Women's World Cup, with coach Torcaso outlining the roadmap for the squad’s dev...

item.title: Autopsy Conducted on Heche Driver's Body to Determine Cause of Death
item.description: Authorities have initiated a thorough investigation into the death of a Heche driver, with the body undergoing detailed forensic examination and biological samples collected for scientific analysis to...

item.title: Major reshuffle in Rawalpindi administration and police
item.description: The Punjab government conducted a significant administrative and police reshuffle in Rawalpindi, replacing key officials including the commissioner, deputy commissioner, city police officer, chief tra...

item.title: Herrington and Souttar miss penalties as Socceroos exit World Cup after shootout defeat, with strong support from teammates and Zlatan Ibrahimović
item.description: The Socceroos’ FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign has ended in disappointment following a dramatic penalty shootout defeat to Egypt. Australia’s hopes of reaching the knockout stages for the first time were...

item.title: Revisiting Mission San Juan Capistrano's Legacy: A Critical Look at California's Colonial Past
item.description: The article critically examines the historical narrative of Mission San Juan Capistrano, challenging the romanticized portrayal of Spanish colonization in California. It highlights how traditional edu...

item.title: Trump warns of threats to American identity in Mount Rushmore speech ahead of US 250th anniversary
item.description: US President Donald Trump delivered a strongly patriotic address at Mount Rushmore on the eve of the United States’ 250th anniversary, warning that American identity is facing what he described as a r...

item.title: GWS Ends Fremantle's 14-Game Winning Streak with Dominant Victory Over Dockers
item.description: In a thrilling AFL clash at Manuka Oval, GWS Giants delivered a stunning 21-point victory over Fremantle Dockers, ending the Dockers' 14-game winning streak. Forward Jake Stringer was the star perform...

item.title: A Brief History of American Breakthroughs
item.description: This article explores the United States' trajectory from ancient geological events to modern technological advancements, framing its development as a continuous flow of innovation. It highlights key m...

item.title: Iran Holds State Funeral for Assassinated Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei
item.description: Iran is holding extensive funeral ceremonies for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, the assassinated supreme leader, following his killing in a US-Israeli strike. The events, spanning six days, are expected to d...

item.title: Maasai Mara University Offers 21 Teaching and Administrative Roles
item.description: Maasai Mara University, a public institution chartered in 2013, has announced the availability of 21 job vacancies across two key divisions: Academic and Student Affairs, and Administration, Finance, ...

item.title: Regina Roughriders secure 27-22 win after late defensive stand against Redblacks
item.description: The Regina Roughriders extended their winning streak with a hard-fought 27-22 victory over the Ottawa Redblacks, showcasing resilience in the final minutes of the game. Despite a late rally by the Red...

item.title: Journalist Abducted Over Report On CBN Deputy Governor
item.description: A journalist from Secrets Reporters, Stanley Ugagbe, has gone missing after being allegedly abducted by security operatives linked to the CBN Deputy Governor, Emem Nnanna Etuk Usoro. The publisher of ...

item.title: BJP Accuses Government of Conspiracy to Undermine Democracy
item.description: The article discusses allegations by the BJP against the government of a 'dangerous conspiracy' aimed at undermining democratic processes. The BJP claims the government is orchestrating a plot to erod...
